creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to ports.maintainer from comment #9)

You are right, it was a miscommunication. Agreed! But there is a tool, not especially for that freebsd-update or from source, I know that does not solve the problem (properly). So strictly speaking there is nothing like it and moving the ca_root_nss out of /etc/ssl/certs is the right think to do. I agree with you.

Therefore, personally, I consider your request as justified, though I don't understand why you closed it.
